name: Claude Copilot Marketplace
description: Single-entry marketplace for Claude Copilot. Add this as an extraKnownMarketplaces source so your team can discover and install the framework via /plugin install claude-copilot.

plugins.name: claude-copilot
plugins.description: Claude Copilot — specialized agents (ta/me/qa/sd/design/do/doc/kc), skills, commands, and hooks that give Claude persistent memory, expert methodology, and task tracking.
plugins.author: Claude Copilot contributors

cc.description: cc CLI — memory, skill management, extension resolution

tc.description: tc CLI — task copilot (PRD, task, work product storage)

_usage.add_marketplace: Add to your Claude Code settings: extraKnownMarketplaces: ["<repo-url>/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json"]
_usage.after_install: Run 'bash tools/cc/install.sh' and 'pip install -e tools/tc' to enable full functionality. Then run 'cc doctor' to verify.
